title: Dry nose solutions for smokers: 9 herbal essential oils
description: Eucalyptus globulus essential oils have natural decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties that can help ease a dry nose. The main constituents of Eucalyptus globulus essential oils, such as eucalyptol, limonene, and alpha-pinene, work together to reduce nasal congestion and inflammation. When you inhale the oil through steam inhalation or use it in a humidifier, these compounds help loosen mucus and open up airways, making it easier to breathe.
